name: @vanillagreen/pi-questions
description: Pi extension for structured multi-tab inline questions and bridge-driven replies.

settings.label: Enable questions
settings.description: Register the question tool, inline question UI, and bridge question service.

settings.label: Glyph style
settings.description: Glyphs for vstack-owned UI chrome. Unicode is the default; ASCII uses plain box/status/separator characters for terminal compatibility. pi-tool-renderer's global override wins when set.

settings.label: Question UI mode
settings.description: Where interactive questions render: editor replaces the input area; overlay restores the floating popup.

settings.label: Overlay popup width
settings.description: Preferred overlay popup width in terminal columns when Question UI mode is overlay.

settings.label: Overlay popup max height
settings.description: Maximum overlay height when Question UI mode is overlay; accepts a number or percentage string.

settings.label: Visible option rows
settings.description: Maximum option rows shown before scrolling. Editor mode does not pad short lists with blank rows.

settings.label: Default question header
settings.description: Fallback title when a question request has no header.

settings.label: Bridge replies enabled
settings.description: Allow pi-session-bridge to answer/reject pending questions.

author: vanillagreen
